metadata.title: About - Gaston Allende
metadata.description: Learn more about Gaston Allende, his background, experience, and education in frontend development.

hero.title: About Me
hero.subtitle: Frontend specialist with 12+ years of experience building enterprise applications, now expanding into AI and Python

bio.title: Building for the Long Term
paragraphs: I've been working as a developer for over 12 years, mainly focused on frontend development with Angular in enterprise environments. Over time, I've also explored the backend side with C# and .NET, which has helped me understand how systems fit together beyond just the UI.
Today, I work in the financial sector building stable and maintainable applications, and I enjoy being part of teams that care about long-term quality rather than quick fixes.
Recently, I've started moving toward AI and generative AI, learning Python and gradually building knowledge in that space, step by step — especially where frontend, backend, and AI intersect.

metadata.title: Projects - Gaston Allende
metadata.description: Explore the projects built by Gaston Allende — from web apps to design systems.

header.title: Featured Projects
header.subtitle: A collection of my recent work spanning web development, mobile apps, and innovative digital solutions

items.title: E-Commerce Platform
items.description: A modern e-commerce solution with real-time inventory
items.fullDescription: Built a comprehensive e-commerce platform featuring real-time inventory management, secure payment processing, and an intuitive admin dashboard. The platform handles thousands of transactions daily with 99.9% uptime.

items.title: Design System
items.description: Comprehensive design system for enterprise applications
items.fullDescription: Created a scalable design system used across multiple products, featuring 100+ components, comprehensive documentation, and accessibility guidelines. Reduced design-to-development time by 40%.

items.title: Analytics Dashboard
items.description: Real-time analytics with interactive visualizations
items.fullDescription: Built an advanced analytics dashboard processing millions of data points in real-time. Features customizable widgets, automated reporting, and predictive analytics powered by modern algorithms.

items.title: Social Platform
items.description: Next-generation social networking experience
items.fullDescription: Launched a social media platform with innovative features including AI-powered content recommendations, live streaming, and advanced privacy controls. Scaled to support 50,000+ concurrent users.

items.title: Mobile Banking App
items.description: Secure mobile banking with biometric authentication
items.fullDescription: Developed a feature-rich mobile banking application with advanced security features including biometric authentication, encrypted transactions, and real-time fraud detection.

items.title: Component Library
items.description: Reusable React component library with full TypeScript support
items.fullDescription: Developed and published an open-source React component library with full TypeScript support, comprehensive documentation, and a Storybook playground. Used by multiple teams across different projects.
